name: hn-techpulse-remotion
description: Remotion renderer for HN TechPulse video pipeline

scripts.build: npx remotion render src/index.ts HNTechPulseComposition out/output.mp4 --props=public/props.json
scripts.render: npx remotion render src/index.ts HNTechPulseComposition out/output.mp4 --props=public/props.json
scripts.still: npx remotion still src/index.ts HNTechPulseComposition out/preview.png --props=public/props.json --frame=0
